series_metadata.series_title: International Fuel Tax (IFTA) Reports, Suport Schedules
series_metadata.series_description: IFTA license application (OHIF-1), IFTA tax return (OHIF-5), IFTA tax return supporting schedules (OHIF-5E, 5G, 5N and 5P),IFTA audits, billing payments, IFTA transmittals and relaed documentation/correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy 5 years after expiration of calendar year in which received., Paper: Shred
